message: Elixir 1.14 may increase compile and boot times. (detected Elixir 1.14 in job "ci").
why: Elixir version impacts compilation and boot times in CI.
suggestion: Upgrade to Elixir 1.15 for faster compile and boot times in CI.
measurementHint: Benchmark compile times on the recommended Elixir version.
aiHandoff: Review job "ci" in .github/workflows/elixir-ci.yml for Elixir version configuration.

message: OTP 25 may impact CI test/runtime performance. (detected OTP 25 in job "ci").
why: OTP 25 has known performance regressions in CI test and runtime execution.
suggestion: Upgrade to OTP 26 for faster test and runtime performance in CI.
measurementHint: Benchmark test suite runtime on OTP 26 vs 25.
aiHandoff: Review job "ci" in .github/workflows/elixir-ci.yml for OTP version configuration.

message: Job "ci" runs make/gmake without parallelization in steps #3, #4, #5.
why: Make defaults to serial execution. 3 commands in the same job each run serially, multiplying the wasted wall time.
suggestion: Add -j$(nproc) to make/gmake or set MAKEFLAGS=-j$(nproc) in workflow/job/step env.
measurementHint: Compare build step duration before and after adding parallel flags.
aiHandoff: Review .github/workflows/elixir-ci.yml job "ci" and add parallelization flags to make/gmake commands.
